Supervised finetuning on synthetic prompt/response pairs with a response-only loss mask.
Stage four. The pretrained model is adapted to instruction following on referent-free pairs, computing loss only on the response span.

Finetuning continues from the pretrain checkpoint and trains on prompt/response pairs rendered with role control tokens, masking the prompt so only the response contributes to the loss. The result is a chat-capable model that stays inside the referent-free world.
